prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京化工大学在安徽省理科/物理类最低录取位次分别为约12628名、15562名、15295名、13666名、14007名。2022年位次大幅后移约2934名，2023年 略回升至15295名，2024年新高考首年回升至13666名，2025年小幅后移至14007名。近5年位次波动区间约12628–15562名，2025年基准位次约14007名；该校在安 徽省理科/物理类招生计划逐年递增：2021年103人、2022年106人、2023年106人、2024年114人、2025年118人。2026年计划增至127人，较2025年扩招9人（增幅约7.6% ），扩招幅度较为明显，对竞争格局产生一定影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京化工大学是教育部直属的211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第57名，近年排名稳 步上升（2021年第62→2026年第57），学校层次在211高校中处于中上游水平；2024年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及师德问题调查回应，未见明显负面舆情扩 散；2026年声誉数据中该校未出现重大负面事件。抖音综合热度总排名第7（高热），短视频曝光量大，反映报考关注度较高。历史投档异常数据中未见北京化工大学相关记录。 第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评A，化学获评A-，材料科学与工程获评A-，共3个A-及以上学科。化工、材料、化学是该校核心优势，与招生专业中的工 科试验班（先进材料、绿色化工、生物医药等）高度对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校核心专业方向（化工、材料、化学）属于"生化环材"大类，社会舆论整体偏"明显劝退"， 就业预期相对保守。但计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等社会热门专业该校亦有开设，形成冷热分化。安徽省2026年高考总人数约45.1万，较2025年约46.2万略有减少；物 理类考生估算约31.4万，较2025年32.1万减少约7000人，竞争压力略有缓解。；北京化工大学位于北京市，对安徽考生属于 跨省报考。该校在安徽省招生占比约2.8%（2025年数据），属正常跨省招生规模，无明显地域偏好信号。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次14007名、2026年扩招7.6%（位次 后移压力）、安徽省物理类考生略减（位次前移动力）、学校声誉平稳且抖音高热（报考关注度较高）、核心专业社会热度偏低等多重因素，扩招带来的竞争加剧效应略大于考生 减少的缓解效应。，结合考生规模微幅减少做有限修正，预测2026年最低录取位次约14678名，区间14178–15178名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beijing University of Chemical Technology in Anhui Province for Science/Physics Category were approximately 12,628, 15,562, 15,295, 13,666, and 14,007 respectively. In 2022, the ranking dropped significantly by about 2,934 places, then slightly recovered to 15,295 in 2023, rebounded to 13,666 in the first year of the new Gaokao in 2024, and slightly moved back to 14,007 in 2025. The ranking fluctuation range over the past 5 years is approximately 12,628–15,562, with a baseline ranking of about 14,007 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Science/Physics Category in Anhui Province has increased year by year: 103 in 2021, 106 in 2022, 106 in 2023, 114 in 2024, and 118 in 2025. In 2026, the plan increases to 127, an expansion of 9 students compared to 2025 (an increase of about 7.6%), which is relatively significant and will have a certain impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Chemical Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university directly under the Ministry of Education. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 57th, with a steady rise in recent years (62nd in 2021 → 57th in 2026). The university's level is in the upper-middle tier among 211 universities. In 2024, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, mainly involving a response to a survey on teacher ethics, with no obvious negative public opinion spreading. In 2026 reputation data, no major negative incidents occurred for this university. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking: 7th (high heat), with large short video exposure, reflecting high attention from applicants. No abnormal admission records were found for Beijing University of Chemical Technology. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A, Chemistry was rated A-, and Materials Science and Engineering was rated A-, totaling 3 disciplines at A- or above. Chemical engineering, materials, and chemistry are the core strengths of the university, highly corresponding to the engineering experimental classes (advanced materials, green chemical engineering, biomedicine, etc.) in the admission majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's core major directions (chemical engineering, materials, chemistry) belong to the 'biology, chemistry, environment, materials' category, with overall social opinion leaning 'clearly discouraged', and employment expectations relatively conservative. However, the university also offers popular majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, forming a cold-hot differentiation. The total number of Gaokao candidates in Anhui Province in 2026 is approximately 451,000, slightly decreased from about 462,000 in 2025; the estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 314,000, a decrease of about 7,000 from 321,000 in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure. Beijing University of Chemical Technology is located in Beijing, which is a cross-province application for Anhui candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Anhui Province is about 2.8% (2025 data), which is a normal cross-province enrollment scale, with no obvious regional preference signal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the baseline ranking of 14,007 in 2025, the 7.6% enrollment expansion in 2026 (pressure to move ranking backward), the slight decrease in Physics Category candidates in Anhui Province (force to move ranking forward), stable university reputation and high Douyin heat (high application attention), and low social popularity of core majors, the competition intensification effect from enrollment expansion is slightly greater than the easing effect from candidate reduction. With limited correction for the slight decrease in candidate size, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 14,678, with a range of 14,178–15,178.

- Materials Science and Engineering (Materials, Big Data Dual Degree)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)

- Engineering Experimental Class (Green Chemical Engineering and Biomedicine)
- Science Experimental Class (Green Chemistry)
- Environmental Engineering (Environmental Engineering, Big Data Dual Degree)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 14,678, range 14,178–15,178. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit (14,178) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Hongde Academy and Computer Class; candidates with rankings around the middle (14,678) are advised to mainly consider Tier 2 majors, such as Automation Class and dual degree programs; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (15,178) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options. The university's chemical engineering and materials are traditional advantageous disciplines but have low social popularity. The dual degree programs (chemical engineering/materials/bioengineering + big data) combine disciplinary advantages with employment competitiveness and are worth special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beijing University of Chemical Technology in Anhui Province for Liberal Arts/History Category were approximately 2834, 3357, 2988, 3272, and 3090 respectively. The ranking fluctuation range over the past 5 years is about 2834–3357, with a baseline ranking of approximately 3090 in 2025, showing a slight fluctuation trend. The enrollment plan for Liberal Arts/History Category in Anhui Province: 16 students each year from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 13 in 2025, and maintained at 13 in 2026, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Chemical Technology is a 211 and Double First-Class university, ranked approximately 57th in the 2026 Soft Science ranking. It excels in science and engineering, with a relatively small scale of liberal arts programs, thus attracting limited attention from liberal arts candidates. Reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed. On Douyin, its comprehensive popularity ranks 7th (high heat), but the hot content mainly revolves around its science and engineering characteristics, with limited exposure in liberal arts directions. No abnormal filing records have been observed. The university's liberal arts enrollment majors (Law, Business Administration, English, etc.) have corresponding discipline evaluations where Law, Business Administration, Foreign Language and Literature, etc., have not been rated A- or above, indicating no outstanding advantages in liberal arts.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social popularity but fierce competition; Business Administration is divided and wait-and-see; English/Foreign Languages are generally wait-and-see. The estimated number of History Category examinees in Anhui Province in 2026 is about 136,800, a decrease of about 4,600 from 141,400 in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure. Beijing University of Chemical Technology is located in Beijing, which is a cross-province application for Anhui liberal arts candidates. The enrollment plan is stable at 13 students, a very small proportion, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining factors such as the baseline ranking of 3090 in 2025, unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, a slight decrease in the number of History Category examinees (slightly eased competition), and the university's unremarkable liberal arts advantages, with limited adjustment due to the slight decrease in examinee scale. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 3110, with a range of 2610–3610.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 3110, range 2610–3610. Beijing University of Chemical Technology only offers 2 liberal arts majors in Anhui Province (Law and Business Administration), with an enrollment plan of only 13 students, so choices are limited. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit (2610) can aim for Law; those around the middle of the range (near 3110) are advised to focus on Business Administration; those near the upper limit (3610) should apply cautiously. If liberal arts candidates have no special preference for chemical engineering universities, it is recommended to also consider other universities with more prominent liberal arts advantages.
